college_info.college_name: Sanatan Dharma College: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Sanatan Dharma College Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

faqs.question: Is Sanatan Dharma College a known college/Institute?
faqs.answer: Sanatan Dharma College is a distinguished institution offering PG Diploma, Certificate, M.A, M.Sc, B.Voc, BBA, M.Com, BCA, B.Sc, B.Com, B.A. Students can choose these programs to launch their careers in the Hospitality & Travel, Humanities & Social Sciences, IT & Software, Animation, Business & Management Studies, Mass Communication & Media, Beauty & Fitness, Science, Teaching & Education, Accounting & Commerce field. Sanatan Dharma College is known for its dedicated and experienced faculty members committed to delivering these courses. Sanatan Dharma College has received an impressive review rating of 4 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has earned ratings of 4.08 for Campus Life, 3.53 for Placements, 4.24 for Faculty, and 3.97 for Infrastructure.

faqs.question: How much in-campus salary is offered at Sanatan Dharma College to M.A. students?
faqs.answer: Sanatan Dharma College offers in-campus placement salaries in the range of INR 2.5 LPA to M.A. students.

placements.overview: UG Degree (3 year) : In year 2018-19, for 3 year UG Degree, a total of 870 students were admitted at Sanatan Dharma College and 769 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 769 students 78 were placed with median salary of INR 250000 and 652 students opted for higher studies. A total of 917 students were admitted in year 2019-20 for 3 year UG degree at Sanatan Dharma Collegeand 783 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 783 students 102 were placed with median salary of INR 250000 and 545 students opted for higher studies. PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 102 students were admitted at Sanatan Dharma College and 93 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 93 students 6 were placed with median salary of INR 250000 and 36 students opted for higher studies. A total of 86 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at Sanatan Dharma Collegeand 85 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 85 students 4 were placed with median salary of INR 250000 and 25 students opted for higher studies.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sanatan Dharma College offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Accounting & Commerce. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.Sc., BCA and B.Com. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.Sc., M.Com and PG Diploma. Sanatan Dharma College courses are offered to students in Full Time mode.

faqs.answer: A:    Sanatan Dharma College is a well-known institution for PG Diploma, Certificate, M.A, M.Sc, B.Voc, BBA, M.Com, BCA, B.Sc, B.Com, B.A. courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Sanatan Dharma College has course specializations in Front Office Management, English, Sales & Marketing, Hindi, Mathematics, Biotechnology, Electronics, Computer Science, Home Science.
faqs.question: What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at Sanatan Dharma College?

faqs.answer: A:    Sanatan Dharma College provides programmes including PG Diploma, Certificate, M.A, M.Sc, B.Voc, BBA, M.Com, BCA, B.Sc, B.Com, B.A. in streams such as Hospitality & Travel, Humanities & Social Sciences, IT & Software, Animation, Business & Management Studies, Mass Communication & Media, Beauty & Fitness, Science, Teaching & Education, Accounting & Commerce, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Front Office Management, English, Sales & Marketing, Hindi, Mathematics, Biotechnology, Electronics, Computer Science, Home Science.
faqs.question: Which courses does Sanatan Dharma College offer?

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with old school thinking, no extracurricular activities, minimum exposure.

review_content.Placements: Less than 50% of students were placed, average package was about 5 Lacs, recruiting companies included Infosys, Wipro. About 60% of students had internships and others were there just for the sake of it and nothing else. Top roles included manager, consultant, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi connectivity is average, classrooms are old school but tidy, library has a variety of books including history, novels, etc. Hostel facility is not available on campus and canteen is quite bad and sports infrastructure is worse and there are minimum extracurricular activities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of the campus, good placements in 2015, and really good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: 50 to 60% students get campus placement, and they also provide internship programs. They also support entrepreneurship. The highest package is 12 Lacs, and the minimum is 5 Lacs. Teachers and faculty help students to get ready for interviews. There is a career guidance cell to mentor students for career guidance.
review_content.Infrastructure: The green campus is big, and the classes are always clean. Wi-Fi is also available. The sports complex and grounds are very big. The canteen food is very hygienic. There are 4 seminar halls, and they have projectors. The auditorium is for regular events, and Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Life at Sanatan Dharma College, Ambala.

review_content.Placements: We do have a placement cell in our college, but what can we expect from the B.Com course? The placements were not to high this year, and the CTC was very low. Even I got placed in Nath Outsourcing Ltd., but I decided not to join as the CTC was very low and I wanted to go for higher studies, so I left that placement. But for the student who wants placement, this college provides various skills development courses and sessions to enhance the personality and aptitude of the student, which helps them to land on good companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is best compared to the college located in this locality. We have a huge field, a basketball court, and a huge lower garden. The college provides a very good and spacious parking area for students and faculty, which costs around 500 per student for those who want to park in the college parking area for a year. This college does have well-maintained and spacious classrooms and corridors and clean washrooms too. No hostel is available inside the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am partially satisfied with the facility and placement and infrastructure facilities.

review_content.Placements: There are lot of students that are placed with this course. It offers the average package of near about 4 Lacs per annum. There are various recruiting companies that provides the best internships with Stephens according to the students. Various private and known private banks also offers the students with the best job opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus rendered the best services like Wi-Fi internet connectivity, labs, best infrastructure facilities and the best peaceful environment of library. Not only on the point of education but the facilities for food availability in the canteen is also superb. The college gain the best outline in the sports and games field and also other co curriculum activities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Building the future and nurturing potential beyond placements.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements in our college. Our college does not offer placements because it is a Tier-3 college, which falls under the category of low-level colleges. My college's name is Sanatan Dharma College. Getting placements for students after graduation is very tough. I am a final-year student, and I have felt that.
review_content.Infrastructure: In terms of infrastructure, is it good or bad? The classrooms are not, but the library is very nice; we can borrow any type of book for studying and learning, and our college also provides us with Wi-Fi for internet access. Our college labs are also good. The campus is not very impressive, but the sports facilities and opportunities for playing games and sports are very nice.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, it is a well-developed college.

review_content.Placements: In our college, almost 40% of students get placements every year. The placement cell of the college is not highly developed but is working hard to improve placements. The average package offered for biotechnology in our college is 2-5 LPA, with top recruiting companies mainly from the Pharma field.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has well-maintained and developed infrastructure. The labs and library of the college are fully stocked with required materials. Classrooms in our department are large in size. The hostel facilities are also good. The college has its own canteen on the campus, providing reasonably priced food.

admission_overview.college_name: Sanatan Dharma College Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: Sanatan Dharma College admissions are entrance-based. Candidates must appear for certain entrance exams to take admission. The college offers a variety of courses to the candidates at the UG, PG and Certificate level in the field of Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Mass Communication and Media, Humanities and Social Sciences, Hospitality and Travel, Science, Teaching and Education, Animation and Beauty and Fitness. Read below for more details on Sanatan Dharma College admission process:

courses_data.name: Sanatan Dharma College B.Sc. Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Sanatan Dharma College B.Sc.is offered to candidates at the UG level. Candidates are required to participate in the entrance-based admission process to be considered for the final admission offer. Candidates are shortlisted for the B.Sc. programme based on their performance in the entrance exam. Candidates who qualify in the admission process are eligible to secure their seat in the 3 years programme.

courses_data.name: Sanatan Dharma College B.A. Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Sanatan Dharma CollegeoffersB.A.for 3 years. The course is a UG level programme that is offered in full time mode. Applicants must have a sufficient score in one among CBSE 12th and HBSE 12th or equivalent exams. Check the eligibility criteria below before applying to Sanatan Dharma College's B.A. course: Eligibility Criteria

courses_data.name: Sanatan Dharma College BBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: BBA at Sanatan Dharma College is a 3 years UG course in the field of Business & Management Studies. Sanatan Dharma College accepts students based on CBSE 12th and HBSE 12th. The final selection for admission to the Sanatan Dharma College BBA course is based on the student's performance in the mentioned exams. See below the eligibility for Sanatan Dharma College BBA:

reviews.review_heading: College is quite good. It comes under KUK which is a bad aspect about it.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is just satisfied. Classes are too Old. But library is good and new. Canteen also good. I had five subjects in my course. Eco, eng, political. Science, and Hindi was compulsory. Because of Hindi the percentage was affected. Because it's tough than any other subjects.

reviews.review_heading: Placement rate and infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: Overall the infrastructure is good. Facilities like WI-Fi, Water Coolers, etc are available. There are 3 air conditioned libraries available and all the libraries are neat and clean. Labs and classrooms are also air conditioned. Computers are available for students.

reviews.review_heading: The right place to study and get good placements.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure. There are good Chairs, Projector, ACs in every class and computers in every class. The college has good labs. In library, there are many computers for the students along with a clean environment. There is good Wi-Fi network for all the students. There is no limit to use Wi-Fi.

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for NGF College of Engineering and Technology admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: Which courses does NGF College of Engineering and Technology offer?
faqs.answer: NGF College of Engineering and Technology provides programmes including B.E. / B.Tech, BBA, BCA, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Digital Marketing.

faqs.question: Is NGF College of Engineering and Technology a good college/Institute?
faqs.answer: NGF College of Engineering and Technology is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, BBA, BCA, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, NGF College of Engineering and Technology has a rating of 3.58 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.98 on Campus Life, 3.08 on Placements, 3.7 on Faculty and 3.69 on Infrastructure.

placements.overview:
Established in 2008, NGF College of Engineering and Technology is located in Faridabad, Haryana. The institute offers courses like B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, BCA and BBA. These courses are offered in Full Time mode. A total of 22 courses offered by the Institute are available across streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

NGF College of Engineering and Technology offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and BBA. On the other hand, at the PG level, the NGF College of Engineering and Technology offers M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fees for NGF College of Engineering and Technology courses range between INR 76,000 to 1,84,000.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: NGF College of Engineering and Technology offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and BBA. On the other hand, at the PG level, the NGF College of Engineering and Technology offers M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fees for NGF College of Engineering and Technology courses range between INR 76,000 to 1,84,000.

faqs.answer: A:    The fees range for courses offerred by the NGF College of Engineering and Technology is around INR 76000 - INR 184000.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Digital Marketing - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied by this college.

review_content.Placements: There is less no placements in this college, and the average package for this course is 2 LPA. There are few students get internships from this college. This college is not good at giving placements to students, they only want to earn money.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is not available on the campus. Classrooms are maintained, but they charge a high money for attendance. The hostel facilities are not much good, and the food quality in the mess and canteen is not good, with charges high prices. The medical facilities are available in the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Digital Marketing - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The worst decision of my life was to take admission in this college.

review_content.Placements: On average, only 15-20% of students get placed, and they leave their jobs after a few months. The highest package is around 6-7 LPA. Very few students get that much package. The lowest is around 2-3 LPA. I don't know much about the companies, but all of them are from nearby. Around 40-50% of students get internships in nearby companies. Generally, we get jobs in sales, marketing, and supply chain management.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not so good. The front side of the building looks good, but the back side doesn't match the outside. There is no access to Wi-Fi or labs and nearly no classes. The library is almost full of old books. The canteen is the worst part of this college always, dirty with sticky benches, and expired food is sold. They do not take expired food back once it is opened. Sports facilities are zero, and there is no equipment.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied because of placements and campus life is boring.

review_content.Placements: Placement possibilities are very less in this college. Only 10-20% of students might get placements from college otherwise students have to search for jobs and internships by themselves. Also for students who got placements, the highest package must be around 2-3 LPA. For electrical engineering, only a single company came for recruiting during the placement drive.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is below average. It is smaller than other colleges compared to other colleges of the same fee structure. Wi-Fi is included in fees as an internet fee, but the internet is provided to students on campus. But labs are pretty much better but the equipment must be upgraded and repaired. Sports teachers or DPs are supportive. Tournaments are held frequently over time.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The college should provide good companies in our college for recruitment.

review_content.Placements: Students who score a minimum of 70 marks in academics get placed. The salary package offered is overall 1 lakh for 6 months. Industries notice if students work hard or not when they work hard they will maximise the salary of students. Industries test the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good. The canteen is not good, and the quality of serving food is very bad. Wi-Fi is not worth it. Labs are good but some labs are very old. The library is so good. The librarian is very humble and good in nature. The park is so good because there is so much neat and clean grass there.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the college faculty, labs, and placements.

review_content.Placements: This year, only 11 companies came for placement, and all the companies were only for sales. All companies came from Palwal and Faridabad; no one came from Delhi, Gurugram, or any software company. The highest package is around 2.5 to 3 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: I am a student of B.Tech CSE, and in the lab, most of the computers are outdated. Even these software don't support VS Code, and some computers are not working properly. Even after repeated complaints to the faculty, there is no response. The college provides full Wi-Fi across the campus, but you can only use 25 MB per day if you are lucky. About the library, only older-generation books are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides a great platform for you.

review_content.Placements: Top recruiting companies are HCL, BSNL, Snapdeal, Justdial and many more. The highest package of my course is a maximum of 8 lacs, and the minimum is 2 lacs. The college internship program is fabulous and colleges provide internship programs with stipends and make it easy to achieve your dream job.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure arefabolus. All facility members are available at all times. The hostel facilities are divided into girls hostels and boy hostels. For food mess and canteen are available with all types of food are available veg and non-veg, etc.

hostel_campus.college_name: NGF College of Engineering and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The hostel has separate wings for boys and girls. The hostel rooms are spacious, airy, well lighted and fully furnished. All basic amenities are provided including a 24 hrs electricity supply, clean water and indoor as well as outdoor creation facilities.

library.description: NGF College of Engineering & Technology has centrally air conditioned computerized library which is well equipped with 28930 books which are stacked under 4971 titles covering each and every aspect of engineering, technology and management. The library also subscribes to more than 106 national and 42 international journals and periodicals. The  library is member of DELNET (Development Library Network Membership), CSI (Computer Society of India), ICC (Indian Cryogenics Council) and ILA (Indian Library Association).

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Squash Court, Tennis Court, Table Tennis Court, Volleyball Ground, Billiards Table, Shooting Range, Athletic Tracks, Golf

The library also subscribes to more than 106 national and 42 international journals and periodicals. The  library is member of DELNET (Development Library Network Membership), CSI (Computer Society of India), ICC (Indian Cryogenics Council) and ILA (Indian Library Association).

hostel.description: The hostel has separate wings for boys and girls. The hostel rooms are spacious, airy, well lighted and fully furnished. All basic amenities are provided including a 24 hrs electricity supply, clean water and indoor as well as outdoor creation facilities.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Squash Court, Tennis Court, Table Tennis Court, Volleyball Ground, Billiards Table, Shooting Range, Athletic Tracks, Golf

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Language Lab, Fluid Mechanics Lab, Kinematics of Machine Lab, Basics of Mechanical Engineering Lab, Advanced Thermal Lab, Data Structure and Algorithm Lab, Advance Java Lab, Design and Circuit Lab, Analog Electronics Circuit Lab, Surveying Lab, Concrete Lab, Power Electronics Lab, Power System Lab, Communication Skills Lab, Weaving Lab, Textile Testing Lab, Pattern Making Lab

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied by this college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is not available on the campus. Classrooms are maintained, but they charge a high money for attendance. The hostel facilities are not much good, and the food quality in the mess and canteen is not good, with charges high prices. The medical facilities are available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: The worst decision of my life was to take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not so good. The front side of the building looks good, but the back side doesn't match the outside. There is no access to Wi-Fi or labs and nearly no classes. The library is almost full of old books. The canteen is the worst part of this college always, dirty with sticky benches, and expired food is sold. They do not take expired food back once it is opened. Sports facilities are zero, and there is no equipment.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of placements and campus life is boring.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is below average. It is smaller than other colleges compared to other colleges of the same fee structure. Wi-Fi is included in fees as an internet fee, but the internet is provided to students on campus. But labs are pretty much better but the equipment must be upgraded and repaired. Sports teachers or DPs are supportive. Tournaments are held frequently over time.

reviews.review_heading: The college should provide good companies in our college for recruitment.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good. The canteen is not good, and the quality of serving food is very bad. Wi-Fi is not worth it. Labs are good but some labs are very old. The library is so good. The librarian is very humble and good in nature. The park is so good because there is so much neat and clean grass there.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the college faculty, labs, and placements.
reviews.review_text: I am a student of B.Tech CSE, and in the lab, most of the computers are outdated. Even these software don't support VS Code, and some computers are not working properly. Even after repeated complaints to the faculty, there is no response. The college provides full Wi-Fi across the campus, but you can only use 25 MB per day if you are lucky. About the library, only older-generation books are available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides a great platform for you.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure arefabolus. All facility members are available at all times. The hostel facilities are divided into girls hostels and boy hostels. For food mess and canteen are available with all types of food are available veg and non-veg, etc.

reviews.review_heading: This college can't give you college experience.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. The college spreads over 27 hectares of land but feels boring after some time. The Wi-Fi is so bad that you can't even text anyone. Labs are quite good and well maintained, but they don't allow students to use the labs in their free time. Hostel is good according to the fee they charge. The mess is also good, but the college canteen is very bad. The stuff here has no taste. It just feels that I wasted my money every time when I eat from the college canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Not completely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not as good as it should be but not so bad that students can not learn anything interesting, and cooperative students definitely can study here. The library of this college is quite good and there is always a rush in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend not to take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this campus is not in good condition. The facility is also not good. The campus have Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, canteen, and stationary. The facility of hostel is above average. The hostel rooms have AC rooms and non AC rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is the main problem and also placements arecnot satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: There is no wireless fidelity for students and labs also have poor infrastructure whereas library is satisfactory and classroom are also average. I am at the last year of my college and I didn't SEE any sports activity whereas food is quite good in the canteen and I didn't know about medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with my college because it lacks good faculty.
reviews.review_text: From my perspective, the infrastructure is below average. Labs and classrooms are averagely maintained, and Wi-Fi is not available in all the labs. Additionally, a significant number of computer systems do not function properly. The quality of food in the mess is average, and the sports facilities in our college are below par.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: The faculty is not that good. Below-average infrastructure. Wi-Fi is not available in every classroom; only specific rooms are arranged with Wi-Fi facilities. Labs are not that developed. The library is quite good. Classrooms are big enough to hold like 100 students.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty and good placements in 2021.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available for all students; labs are available for all students; classrooms are also available for all students; the library is also free and available for all students; and in the library, all types of books that refer to different departments are available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because this college has no placement and no facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available in this college, and the internet connectivity is very poor. Labs are available in different branches. The hostel's facilities are standard, such as a common room with no extra amenities for guests, and the food quality is average.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for students.
reviews.review_text: There are so many facilities and infrastructure available for our course. There is a good Wi-Fi network and many labs. Different subjects have different labs. Library is also very good. Sports facility is also available. Medical facilities are also available.

Animaster Design College

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Animaster Design College Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college has really good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Nearly 85% of the students from our course got placed. The highest salary package offered was 15 LPA, while the lowest salary package offered was 3.5 LPA and the average salary package offered was 7 LPA. Flipkart, Amazon and Game Production Pvt Ltd are the top recruiting companies for our college. Animation and graphic design are the top roles offered to students. About 45% of the students got internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are no Wi-Fi facilities for our college students. However, classrooms are adequate. The library includes a selection of books for every single department. Our college management is currently not providing facilities to the hostels. So we have to join outside PG hostels. Medical facilities are available, but games and sports are somewhat less with variety of playgrounds.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Animation and Multimedia - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: The good standards considering poor quality of animation institutes in Bangalore and India at large.

review_content.Placements: The placements don't exist at Animaster due to the absence of the placement cell. The Animaster did not tie up or alliance with any animation company/studio, where it can send their students for getting hands-on industry experience. The students work hard to get the internships and the placements by registering themselves with the online job portals. A few websites are offering the internships based on the skills. I never heard of any particular animation or graphic designing companies visiting the Animaster campus for the placements. The students here are skilful and able to get an internship and job by producing quality, portfolios for showcasing their work, which is done by themselves through hours of browsing the internet and getting leads online.

reviews_list.batch_info: Certificate in Graphic and Communication Design - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: As a student in Animaster's B.Sc. animation and VFX degree in Bangalore.

review_content.Placements: I have passed out in the year of 2024 and the placement is very good here in the animaster. In our batch approximately 90% students have been placed with good package and in their dream companies. The placement team is very much supportive and helpful who guides in each and every phase of selection process.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is very much satisfied and best as it has all the latest version of technologies with high capacity labs including the latest technology accessories. The admin team help in each phase related to technological terms. I'm really glad to be a part of this college .

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Animation and Multimedia - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: My college is absolutely good and has good placements.

content.Placements: This percentage of students placed in companies is approx 60 to 70 percent. Most of the students got jobs in good companies. In college, most of the students got internships being nearly about 80 to 90%. Top course of college is animation and VFX.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are good, we got a lab for studying and working in our free time. The college system is good for the students to learn software, etc. The college provides internet facility in the lab systems only. There is a library available but it's small for an animation student. Otherwise, this library is enough.

individual_reviews.course: BVA in Applied Arts and Graphic Design - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the college because of the management.

content.Placements: Basically our college doesn't have any campus placement programme, so its hard to get placed through college. Also there is no other person in my course and they probably have closed this course now. I haven't got placed still but I know it from the seniors as how difficult it was for them.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi or canteen for students. Also there is no medical facility existing. Its more like an institution. There is no hostel in our college, students mostly live in PG or flats. For sports we have to travel 2-3 kms to the ground and its not regular, it hardly happens once in a month.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Galaxy Global Group of Institutions offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and B.Des. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Galaxy Global Group of Institutions offers M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the college .

content.Placements: The placement department provides a strong foundation through pre-placement visits and also provides industrial visits. The highest package is about INR 30 thousand per month, the lowest package is INR 20 thousand per month, and the average package is INR 25 thousand per month.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is great, and classrooms are well maintained. Hostel facilities are not good, but the canteen is average. Wi-Fi is working here, and there is also a well-maintained library where you can read the books. Medical facilities are not good enough here.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the college.

content.Placements: B.Tech CSE has less number of placements. In Other courses there is no placement. Average package of the students is 25k per month. Below 50% of students got internship from our course. And I don't know the companies in which they got internship.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure here is great and classrooms are well maintained. Hostel facilities are not good but the canteen is average. Wi-Fi is working here and there is well maintained library. Medical facilities are not good here. Sports and games are below average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely not satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: No placements are done by the college for our course, but yes, in other courses there are good numbers of placements. For example, B.Tech. CSE has a good number of placements here, and the average package for this course's students is INR 30k per month, which is pretty decent pay.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure here is great, and classrooms are well maintained. Hostel facilities are not good, but the canteen is average. Wi-Fi is working here, and there is also a well-maintained library where you can read the books. Medical facilities are also good enough here.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Best value for money college.

content.Placements: Our college's placement rates are very good. Up to 90 percent of placements are offered here by top companies or institutions like Paytm, Accenture, HCL, Mahindra, etc. The highest package offered here till date is INR 5LPA, which I guess is fair enough for a private university with such low fees and great faculty and opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: The courses here are very good. They have well-maintained labs and instruments, and along with that, the hostels are also nice. The food offered here is very homely, tastes good, and is hygienic too. There are many other facilities also offered by our college, like open playgrounds, common rooms for studying, and a library.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied due to good placements and good faculty.

content.Placements: Placement department provides a strong foundation through pre-placement talks, workshops and they also provide industrial visits. Companies like Wipro, Accenture, Call India ltd., HDFC Bank ltd., ICICI Bank ltd., Multisoft System, Big Bang and many more visit here. The highest package is 4.9 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is too good. The college is in a good area in an open environment. There are many labs in the college from where we can learn much better than we learn in theory. Classrooms and library are well maintained. In hostel, good quality of food is available in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: The college has really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The campus has free Wi-Fi. A cafeteria, library and a very clean hostel are available. The mess food is very healthy. A huge playground is available on campus. A green park and lifts are available. Showers are available in the hostel washrooms. Bus facilities are available. An ATM is available.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, best faculty. Totally recommended.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the institute and the hostel is very well planned. The infrastructure is very well-equipped with all the best among the best facilities. The overall campus is good in every way. The campus is green and has a soothing atmosphere which makes studying much better.

reviews.review_heading: It has been a great experience studying at this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has provided great infrastructure and facilities for students. They provide all the basic requirements which are required in the college. Quality services are provided in terms of sports, and they take care of the canteen every day.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Galaxy Global Group of Institutions (GGGI, Ambala).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good, and it seems like the top education centre. Libraries are good, and they provide almost all the required books for students. The sports complex is the best part, and it is excellent and well-maintained. Wi-Fi and air-conditioned facility is also available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: GGGI is a great way to enhance your knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of GGGI is so attractive and well-maintained. The campus is located in a very natural and peaceful environment which proves to be the best for learning. It has very good labs with high tech instruments. The campus has a well-furnished library and smart classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers in our college are helpful.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good facilities for food in mess and canteen. Other facilities, like medical facilities, are also good. Our college provides sports and games facilities. Every year, sports day is organised for games and sports which develop the sports skills of the students.

reviews.review_heading: GGGI is one of the best institutes for fashion and apparel design in Haryana.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good, and there is a huge and environment-friendly campus. There are more than enough labs for us to learn in an advanced way which we learnt in theory. Our college provides the best guiding books and study materials in the library.

reviews.review_heading: Totally satisfied with the infrastructure, and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent. All the facilities are available including Labs, well maintained classrooms and a library. Hostel is hygienic and good quality of food is available in mess as well as canteen. Sports facilities and immediate medical attention is provided.

reviews.review_heading: Practical as well as theoretical knowledge provided by the teachers was excellent.
reviews.review_text: The Institute was rich in Infrastructure and amenities. It offered various required amenities to the students. The quality of food available in canteen and mess was so good and hygienic. Medical facilities were also very good. Sports activities were also organised frequently.

Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc. and M.Sc. Shri Shankaracharya Professional University fees ranges between INR 15,000 to 2,80,000. Shri Shankaracharya Professional University offers these course across fields such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce and Design. Shri Shankaracharya Professional University offers all the campus facilities to students.

review_summary.college_name: Shri Shankaracharya Professional University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure and faculty members are good, but placements are not really good.

content.Placements: Less than 20% were placed, with the highest package being 1.8 LPA and the lowest I don’t know. Only Patra India came for all courses. Less than 10% do internship. The dream is for a developed career, but instead, I am forced to work as a call center executive. Placements are the worst. If you just want a degree without a job, you can join this college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is the best in Bhilai, with premium labs equipped with Intel i3 11th Gen CPUs. There is Wi-Fi, but it doesn't work, and the lift in our building is broken. Classrooms are quite good, and the library is very big. We get every book from the library, and I haven't purchased any books during my graduation.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: If you are not from Chhattisgarh, don't take admission; it is not that much worth it.

content.Placements: They say there are 100% placements but it totally depends on the skills you have to clear the interview. Google, Samsung, Honda, Lava, HCL, etc. are the top recruitment companies. Assistant engineer, backend developer, frontend developer, etc. are the top roles offered. The highest package is around 20 lacs, and the average package is 5 lacs.
content.Infrastructure: Every daily need for facilities is available in the hostel and, in particular, in every department. Food quality is good, medical facilities like first aid are available, and a sports field is available on campus. Infrastructure is good and it looks green; there are canteens and mess.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: SSPU a perfect college for management.

content.Placements: The placement opportunities are good in our college; we get decent internship opportunities. The average package offered was four LPA. People who have passed out from our course get good posts in good companies and create good startups. They have good managing skills.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is very good. We have air-conditioned classrooms, Wi-Fi connectivity available in our classrooms, and a very good auditorium. There are many good opportunities for sports and games. Overall, one can have a decent college life, and the library is also available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: You can have fun only if have nice friend group here.

content.Placements: Placement companies do visit our campus. I don't know much about placements as I did not have any interaction with my super seniors but I know that good placements are offered in our campus, TCS and many more. In BCA you get placement offers for web development post/job.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is great. We have nice computer labs, classrooms and library. Canteen is okay and food is not bad. There is not much facilities in hostel. You have to bring everything of your need you cannot expect that with hostel and yes outing time is only till 6 pm after that you have to take permission from your parents.

About 50% of the students got internships, while the rest of the students disobeyed their jobs. It was good to study in this college, and I have gained the most knowledge from this college and also really learned a lot.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, the facilities are very good. Every classroom has a separate air-conditioning system and also Wi-Fi facility. The canteen is also very good, and good food is available in it. Sports are also conducted every year. Library and labs are also good here.

It may appear unusual to study Geography and Geology, but candidates would want to know what they are looking at.The most common aviation degree programme is the Bachelor of Science in Aviation. This degree provides a broad understanding of the Aviation industry, covering topics such as aviation regulations, safety, management, and operations. Graduates with this degree can pursue careers as pilots, air traffic controllers, airport managers, and more.

review_summary.college_name: MIT Vishwaprayag University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Application (MCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The university offers good infrastructure and decent placements, with scope for self-growth.

content.Placements: I belong to the MCA course at MIT Vishwaprayag University. Around 60–70% of students get placed, with salary packages ranging from 3 LPA to 7–8 LPA depending on the company and role. The university provides placement support, but placements and internships mainly depend on individual skills, projects, and practical knowledge. Students who actively work on internships, certifications, and technical skills have better chances of securing good opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: MIT Vishwaprayag University has good infrastructure. It has campus-wide Wi-Fi, well-equipped computer labs, and smart classrooms. It supports effective learning. Hostel facilities are decent and comfortable for students. University also gives strong importance to sports, and regularly organizing events. It provides all the required equipment for respective sports, encouraging overall student development.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (AI & ML) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with faculty members, infrastructure, and good facilities.

content.Placements: In my course, there are 75 students. The highest package offered till now is of 2,00,000 may be. The recruitment companies are like Infosys, etc. 60% of students got internships, and others got package offers. I don't know about top roles offered in our course. But every student has its own talent based on which they get jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of our college is very good, which means there are large classrooms. Computer labs are available whenever you want to use them. The hostel is not fully developed yet but its infrastructure is also good. Mess and canteen food are also best quality.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Our university is located in Kegav near Solapur. It is the best university in Solapur.

content.Placements: So, currently I am in my 3rd year of B.Tech in Computer Science. In our class, there are 20 students. The highest and the lowest package offered depends on skills of that particular person. If students have good skills and do some projects, they will get a placement with the highest package.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of our course include Wi-Fi connection in labs and classrooms. Every student has their own individual PC. Facilities available in the hostel are Wi-Fi and lifts. There are AC and non-AC rooms. The food is also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure, campus life, and average faculty.

content.Placements: For now, only the PG batches like MBA and MCA are placed. The highest package offered is 9 LPA, and the lowest package ranges from 3-4 LPA. The average package offered is 6 LPA. Various companies like TCS, Wipro, Cognizant, Amdocs, Precision, etc., hire students. Every student gets internships based on their skills.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good Wi-Fi, excellent labs with updated PCs, clean classrooms, and a well-stocked library. Hostel rooms are okay. The food in the mess is tasty but a bit costly. All the sports equipment is available, like football, cricket kits, table tennis, badminton, volleyball, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am thankful and satisfied.

content.Placements: So now I am in the 3rd year after a semester gap. From the 3rd year, our professors are going to train us for placement. They are currently in touch with Cisco, Infosys, and other companies, and like our seniors, many companies have come for placement purposes. They have taken aptitude tests and interviews of our seniors who are in their final year, and many have been selected.
content.Infrastructure: In our university, it's 7 7-floor building which includes computer labs, individual computers for every student, electronic lab, physics lab, and huge library for all courses, not only course-related material, but also includes self-growing books, story books, and all. In hostel, there are 2 students in one room, which includes AC and non-AC facilities. Wi-Fi facility and lift are available.

MIT Vishwaprayag University admission is priamarily entrance-based. The university offers courses at UG and PG levels. These are offered through its schools, such as School of Computing, School of Design, School of Business and School of Pharmacy. To be eligible for admission, students must apply and appear for the entrance exams accepted by MIT Vishwaprayag University. Some of these are CET, JEE, PERA CET, ATMA, MAT and others. The university also conducts aptitude test and interview for admission some of the programmes. Candidates looking for admission to MIT Vishwaprayag University can apply on the official website of the university. hostel_campus.college_name: MIT Vishwaprayag University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The university offers good infrastructure and decent placements, with scope for self-growth.
reviews.review_text: MIT Vishwaprayag University has good infrastructure. It has campus-wide Wi-Fi, well-equipped computer labs, and smart classrooms. It supports effective learning. Hostel facilities are decent and comfortable for students. University also gives strong importance to sports, and regularly organizing events. It provides all the required equipment for respective sports, encouraging overall student development.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty members, infrastructure, and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is very good, which means there are large classrooms. Computer labs are available whenever you want to use them. The hostel is not fully developed yet but its infrastructure is also good. Mess and canteen food are also best quality.

reviews.review_heading: Our university is located in Kegav near Solapur. It is the best university in Solapur.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our course include Wi-Fi connection in labs and classrooms. Every student has their own individual PC. Facilities available in the hostel are Wi-Fi and lifts. There are AC and non-AC rooms. The food is also good.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure, campus life, and average faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good Wi-Fi, excellent labs with updated PCs, clean classrooms, and a well-stocked library. Hostel rooms are okay. The food in the mess is tasty but a bit costly. All the sports equipment is available, like football, cricket kits, table tennis, badminton, volleyball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am thankful and satisfied.
reviews.review_text: In our university, it's 7 7-floor building which includes computer labs, individual computers for every student, electronic lab, physics lab, and huge library for all courses, not only course-related material, but also includes self-growing books, story books, and all. In hostel, there are 2 students in one room, which includes AC and non-AC facilities. Wi-Fi facility and lift are available.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and the best faculty.
reviews.review_text: Labs are the best, but sometimes Wi-Fi issues occur, and a few computers do not work. The library is also full of resources and has many books related to our course. The food quality in the canteen is average, but there is a different menu every day. The playground is not ready yet.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty
reviews.review_text: There are lifts in our college four lifts are there and the classrooms are excellent provided with smart tv and individual computers for everyone and the hostel is getting started by this year and it also includes lift and steps and wifi facility in hostel and university too

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with faculty members but not the campus in future.
reviews.review_text: We have computer lab, Wi-Fi, and library with essential books. We also have big classroom and tutorial rooms for students. But not big canteen facility for all students. We have to wait in queue, and also rates are so high for snacks and breakfast but not give that much quantity of food.

review_summary.college_name: Vikrant University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Vikrant University.

content.Placements: I don't remember the exact number, but a lot of students from my batch have got placed, and the average package is Rs. 2.5 Lacs per annum. The highest package is around 8 to 10 Lacs per annum, and the average package is around 2.5 Lacs per annum. A lot of companies come, like Gal India Pvt. Ltd. and VPS Pvt. Ltd., etc. Around 25 to 30% of students got placed in my batch. They offer many roles like fire safety engineer, IT engineer, consultant, system engineer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure here is good, and the faculty is also fine. They mingle well with the students and are not pressurized too much. The faculty here is such that their method of studying is very different, and they teach very well. Every year, events and organizations like tournaments are organized here, in which anyone from the city can take part and win a lot of prizes.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors in Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Yes, all are good for placement, and the overall experience is also good.

content.Placements: Placement is average. Those students who are good in our course and are placed in a company are the highest, approximately 10 Lacs. The lowest is 3 Lacs. For internships, 100% of students get an internship. Annual income is not good, but placement is good not any problem. If you are good in studies, you should take up placement .
content.Infrastructure: They don't have any hostel. All students take their own house rent. They have their own room and canteen. There are 3 canteen. They have an Amul canteen, but one canteen is not good. The other 2 are the best in food and food quality are best in our college in sport field, they are the best because they are the best. They have all grounds.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Microbiology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall, I would like to say that this is one of the best colleges I have ever researched.

content.Placements: I can't say in percentage, but most of the students got placements in the best companies. They provide the best packages. Around 80-85% of students got internships from this college. Our college is very good and tries to give you the best knowledge and placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides library facilities. The environment of our college library is peaceful. Our provides Wi-Fi to improve the skills to study and grow to gain knowledge. Our classrooms are huge. Their environment is very friendly.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A great infrastructure with facilities, but fell short of faculty and placments in 2023.

content.Placements: Placement rates for BBA from top institutes can be 100%, while for mid-tier institutes, it can range between 60% - 80%. The average salary package was 3 LPA - 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies include BCG, Amazon, Brain, IBM, Microsoft, and top consulting and finance firms.
content.Infrastructure: For a BBA course, facilities and infrastructure generally provide a conducive environment for both academic learning and extracurricular activities. Computer labs are equipped with business-related software and tools for data analysis. Smart classrooms are also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am living a very amazing college life at Vikrant University.

content.Placements: Only 20 percent of the students were placed in Computer Science. The highest package is 70 LPA, the average package is 4 LPA, and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA. Google and Microsoft are also recruiting from Vikrant University. 40 percent of students got internships in some companies like Innoctor EduTech and RoboTech. Software Engineer is a top role in Computer Science.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are well maintained and infrastructure is also good. All the necessary things are available, like: Wi-Fi, laboratories, cricket ground, classrooms, technical laboratories, and library. The canteen is average, but medical facilities, sports, and games are amazing.

faqs.question: Who can enroll for admission at Vikrant University?

paragraphs: Vikrant University admissionsare primarily entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to the course. The admission process at Vikrant University is below:-

The mode of application is online/offline. For UG and PG courses, candidates must visit the official website and for the PhD courses, students can either apply online or offline. The application fee for PhD course is INR 2,000. To apply offline for the PhD course, students must go to the institute campus. Candidates can fill out the application form on the university's official website.

The university accepts entrance exam scores such as GATE and JEE Main for admission to the MTech & BTech courses. For PhD course admission, candidates are selected based on in-house entrance exam scores, VU Research Aptitude Test followed by PI.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to various courses at Vikrant University?
faqs.answer: Vikrant University admissions are entrance-based. The university considers national-level entrance exam scores for various course admission. The mode of application is online/offline. For UG and PG courses, candidates must visit the official website and for the PhD courses, aspirants can either apply online or offline. The application fee for PhD course is INR 2,000. To apply offline for the PhD course, students must visit the institute campus. Candidates can fill out the application form on the university's official website. Selected candidates must keep their educational documents ready for verification purposes.

faqs.question: Are admissions to various courses open at Vikrant University?
faqs.answer: Vikrant University admissions are currently open for various courses. The university offers courses such as BTech, BCA, MBA, M.Tech etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers certificate, diploma, PhD and vocational courses. Vikrant University admission 2025 is entrance-based for PhD courses. However, candidates are selected based on merit for the rest of the course level, i.e., UG, PG, Certificate, Diploma and Vocational. Interested candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can fill out the form.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vikrant University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here is good, and the faculty is also fine. They mingle well with the students and are not pressurized too much. The faculty here is such that their method of studying is very different, and they teach very well. Every year, events and organizations like tournaments are organized here, in which anyone from the city can take part and win a lot of prizes.

reviews.review_heading: Yes, all are good for placement, and the overall experience is also good.
reviews.review_text: They don't have any hostel. All students take their own house rent. They have their own room and canteen. There are 3 canteen. They have an Amul canteen, but one canteen is not good. The other 2 are the best in food and food quality are best in our college in sport field, they are the best because they are the best. They have all grounds.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I would like to say that this is one of the best colleges I have ever researched.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides library facilities. The environment of our college library is peaceful. Our provides Wi-Fi to improve the skills to study and grow to gain knowledge. Our classrooms are huge. Their environment is very friendly.

reviews.review_heading: A great infrastructure with facilities, but fell short of faculty and placments in 2023.
reviews.review_text: For a BBA course, facilities and infrastructure generally provide a conducive environment for both academic learning and extracurricular activities. Computer labs are equipped with business-related software and tools for data analysis. Smart classrooms are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am living a very amazing college life at Vikrant University.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are well maintained and infrastructure is also good. All the necessary things are available, like: Wi-Fi, laboratories, cricket ground, classrooms, technical laboratories, and library. The canteen is average, but medical facilities, sports, and games are amazing.

reviews.review_heading: A step towards a bright future and career.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of my college is so good. The environment, classrooms, computer lab, Science lab, and Wi-Fi facility are good. In my department, facilities are good.
Eight ceiling fans are in every classroom. The seating system is also good.
I have not used the hostel facilities, but the canteen is not very good and does not offer a wide variety of food. A medical facility is also on my campus, and it is good for emergency purposes. Sports and many games are also played on my campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college with good facilities and motivated teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides excellent facilities. The quality of food is good and healthy. Computer labs are good. Many books are available in the library. Games and sports teachers are available. Indoor and outdoor games are provided by this university. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vikrant University.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure. Wi-Fi is available. Our classrooms are clean. There is a library and a canteen. There are 3-4 buildings, one for management, one for technical, and another for administration. There is sufficient space in classrooms to study.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vikrant University.
reviews.review_text: The college is painted, so it looks good. A huge playground is available. Many games are played, like basketball, cricket, etc. There is a canteen, a washroom, and an excellent computer lab. We also have a library.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent university in the Gwalior region as well as in Madhya Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus, like in libraries, labs, etc., The college is under CCTV surveillance. Our classrooms are good. The canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent university in Gwalior.
reviews.review_text: There is a separate department for B.Tech. The campus is neat and clean. There are many classrooms. A canteen is available. The quality of food in the canteen is good. There are many labs, like chemistry, physics, mechanical labs, etc. Workshop facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best university in Gwalior.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. It has advanced labs for practical learning, a central library, an auditorium, sports grounds and facilities, drinking water, a canteen, etc. Classrooms are well-lighted and spacious.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good atmosphere for education.
reviews.review_text: Library of our college is good. Canteen is available. There are good classrooms and medical facilities. Our college provides good sports teachers.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vikrant Institute of Technology and Management, Gwalior.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. The campus has a playground, where all the engineering and management students can play lots of sports. In my opinion, the infrastructure is good. There are several buildings for academics.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Gwalior.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is one of the best infrastructures in Gwalior city. It has free Wi-Fi, has a medium-size library which is also a digital library. Classroom of our college in just like as hall of a house, about 100-120 student can sit in one time.

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding IVS School of Design, Pitampura Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: IVS School of Design, Pitampura offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design and Architecture & Planning. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.Sc., B.Des and BFA. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.Sc. and PG Diploma. IVS School of Design, Pitampura courses are offered to students in Full Time and Part Time mode.

faqs.answer: A:    IVS School of Design, Pitampura provides programmes including M.Sc, B.Des, B.Sc, UG Diploma, Certificate, BFA in streams such as Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design, Science, Architecture & Planning, and are excellent for students to build their careers.
faqs.question: Which courses does IVS School of Design, Pitampura offer?

reviews_list.review_title: It is the best interior designing institute.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students in my batch and my senior batch got placements. Around 90% of the students are placed in top-notch companies. The highest salary package offered to a diploma student was Rs. 25,000 per month and the lowest salary offered was Rs. 10,000 per month. Companies like Asian Paints, Reliance Trends and various architecture firms visit the campus for placements. Students get roles as interior designers, consultants, and product designer, etc. Internships are provided from time to time so that students can grab as many opportunities as they can.

reviews_list.batch_info: Professional Diploma in Interior Architecture and Design - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, amazing college.

review_content.Placements: The placements in the college are not good as the highest salary package offered was 3 lacs per annum, and the internship is not good either. The college is not that good, but the placement cell is there. The college needs much improvement in the matter of internships and especially in placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good as Wi-Fi facilities are there but very slow, and classrooms are very good. The canteen is very good, and the food available is also good. There is a good menu and prices are also reasonable according to quantity and quality. The hostel facility is not there in the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Interior Architecture and Design - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: I enjoyed my college life with my friends & faculty.

review_content.Placements: Placement depends upon the student work ability. There is no Placement cell in the college but faculty always helps in getting high & new opportunities. The student get prepared for their bright future. Managing skills and creativity is the part of the curriculum.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classes are well-equipped with drafting tables & stools. Labs are fully furnished with computers & presentation boards. Quality of space is too good. The canteen is hygienic and have good food also. No facility for the hostlers. Medical facilities are available at front desk.

Students get roles as interior designers, consultants, and product designer, etc. Internships are provided from time to time so that students can grab as many opportunities as they can.

individual_reviews.course: Professional Diploma in Interior Architecture and Design - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Overall, amazing college.

content.Placements: The placements in the college are not good as the highest salary package offered was 3 lacs per annum, and the internship is not good either. The college is not that good, but the placement cell is there. The college needs much improvement in the matter of internships and especially in placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good as Wi-Fi facilities are there but very slow, and classrooms are very good. The canteen is very good, and the food available is also good. There is a good menu and prices are also reasonable according to quantity and quality. The hostel facility is not there in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Interior Architecture and Design - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: I enjoyed my college life with my friends & faculty.

content.Placements: Placement depends upon the student work ability. There is no Placement cell in the college but faculty always helps in getting high & new opportunities. The student get prepared for their bright future. Managing skills and creativity is the part of the curriculum.
content.Infrastructure: Classes are well-equipped with drafting tables & stools. Labs are fully furnished with computers & presentation boards. Quality of space is too good. The canteen is hygienic and have good food also. No facility for the hostlers. Medical facilities are available at front desk.

individual_reviews.course: Master Diploma in Interior Architecture and Design (MDPIAD) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: I had a memorable experience in IVS.

content.Placements: Our college provides us with job assistance, and with the help of that, almost all of our batchmates got jobs by the end of the course. Some students started working on their projects directly. One of my friends is earning a salary package of 4.5 LPA. Almost all the students got internships in their parent's firms.
content.Infrastructure: IVS has digital classrooms and maintained computer labs. It is a completely air-conditioned campus. Our college celebrates sports day every year to encourage students in sports and games. Labs and classrooms are highly equipped and maintained. There is no in-house canteen but has multiple options for food in campus surroundings. I have not faced any infrastructure-related problems during my tenure.

college_info.college_name: ID Institute - Creative Design Academy

highlights.summary:
ID Institute is a private Interior Designing Institute located in Bangalore. It was established in 2009 with more than 2300 trained professionals in the field of Designing. It is recognised by the Council for Interior Design Accreditation (CIDA) and works on the American Council of Interior Design Accreditation methodology.

Currently, it offers diploma and certificate programmes in various fields such as Interior Design, Animation VFX and Fashion Design. All the diploma programmes offered are certified by NVUP a unit of National Council for Skill Development and Professional Education Mission registered with NITI AAYOG. The courses offered by the Institute are taught through latest technologies, including VR designs and latest software. Students can also get a chance to work on live projects during their internships.

The campus of the Institute is well-equipped with basic facilities such as labs, smart classrooms, halls, waiting area, cafeteria, conference hall and more. One of the unique features of this Institute is that it allows students to visit the campus and take a free demo class to understand the curriculum. For this, students need to schedule a visit through the official website of the Institute.  It also offers loan facilities to the students through its tie-ups with financial institutions.

Currently, it offers graduate diploma, advanced diploma and certificate programmes in various specialisations of Designing. These programmes are offered under full-time and part-time categories. Candidates, who meet the given eligibility criteria, need to apply online through the official website of the Institute. The course-wise details regarding ID Institute admissions are given below:

Read more: ID Institute Admission Process

The Institute offers full-time and short-term courses. These courses are divided into three categories, namely graduate diploma, advanced diploma and certificate programmes. The duration of these programmes varies from course to course. Admission to all the programmes is done on merit-basis. Candidates are selected on the first-come and first-serve basis. Below mentioned are the details regarding ID Institute courses along with their eligibility criteria and duration:

Read more: ID Institute Courses

It offers placements under all the programmes. The overall placement percentage of the Institute is 98%. Some of the top recruiters that participated in ID Institute placements are mentioned below:

The Institute offers a scholarship on merit basis. For this, it conducts a test, namely IDTEST and the top scorers of the exam will get a scholarship of up to 75 per cent.

Compare ID Institute with other institutes

At the PG level, the college offers courses such as PG Diploma. ID Institute - Creative Design Academy courses are offered to students in Full Time and Part Time mode. Further, the fees structure for ID Institute - Creative Design Academy courses stands around INR 79,998.
